message:
🌱 Add n8n: Bug: ToolsAgent: handleParsedStepOutput incorrectly nests mission (#1448)

@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "n8n-14774-bug-toolsagent-handleparsedstepoutput-incorrectly-nests-output-key-in-",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "n8n: Bug: ToolsAgent: handleParsedStepOutput incorrectly nests 'output' key in returnValues for memory, causing LLM mislearning and Zod validation failures after several turns",
+    "description": "Bug: ToolsAgent: handleParsedStepOutput incorrectly nests 'output' key in returnValues for memory, causing LLM mislearning and Zod validation failures after several turns. This issue affects 5+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify n8n troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your n8n deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review n8n configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant n8n configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl get configmap -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=n8n\n```\n### Bug Description\n\nWhen `ToolsAgent` is used with `N8nStructuredOutputParser` and memory, a critical issue manifests **after several conversational turns**."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Bug: ToolsAgent: handleParsedStepOutput incorrectly nests…",
+        "description": "Modified the wrapping logic in `common.ts` to detect if the parsed output already has the expected `{ output: ... }` structure:\n- If the parsed JSON has only an `output` property, use it as-is to avoid double wrapping\n- Otherwise, wrap it in `{ output: ... }` as expected by the parser\n```yaml\n#### 2. **MCP Server-Side Detection**\nDetect and unwrap nested output structures:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Bug: ToolsAgent: handleParsedStepOutput… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n n8n --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Modified the wrapping logic in `common.ts` to detect if the parsed output already has the expected `{ output: ... }` structure:\n- If the parsed JSON has only an `output` property, use it as-is to avoid double wrapping\n- Otherwise, wrap it in `{ output: ... }` as expected by the parser",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "#### 2. **MCP Server-Side Detection**\nDetect and unwrap nested output structures:",
+        "#### 3. **Strict Input Validation**\nAdd `additionalProperties: false` to tool schemas to catch extraneous fields early:",
+        "#### 4. **LLM-Specific Adaptations**\nDetect n8n clients and provide adapted tool descriptions:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },

+    },
